name: gluon-agent
description: Cross-platform Claude Code and Codex plugin with shared skills, including a deep-research workflow built on orchestrator-worker planning and bounded context reconstruction.

interface.shortDescription: Shared toolkit with deep research workflow
interface.longDescription: Install shared Claude Code and Codex skills, including a deep-research workflow that uses orchestrator-worker planning, Ralph-loop iteration, and workspace reconstruction.
defaultPrompt: Use gluon-agent deep-research to investigate a topic and produce a source-backed report.
Use gluon-agent to explain how Claude Code and Codex share skills through this plugin.
